new_claims.claim_text: US agreed to unfreeze Iranian assets in Qatar and other foreign banks to reopen the Strait of Hormuz
new_claims.notes: Report from Iranian source via Reuters, denied by US official. Directly conflicts with official US statements.

new_claims.claim_text: US denies agreeing to unfreeze Iranian assets
new_claims.notes: Official US denial of Reuters report. Highlights conflicting narratives.

new_claims.claim_text: China preparing weapons shipment to Iran (MANPADs)
new_claims.notes: Reported by CNN, based on US intelligence, denied by China. Suggests covert military support.

updated_claims.notes: New conflicting reports on asset unfreezing directly impact the potential for reopening the Strait of Hormuz, making the 'effectively closed' claim even more contested.
